calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Richard Hoyer, Esq. for Plaintiff: Kellie Ooton, present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Marybeth Dee as follows:
Damages of $118,327.00
Prejudgment interest $23,905.09
Attorney's fees of $5,812.00
Costs of $1,456.00
For the total of $149,500.09
Judgment signed in open court.
